conditions.architecture: Linear homopolymer with various end groups (HO-OH, HO-OC4H9, CH2=CH-OH)
conditions.critical_condition_basis: Retention volume independent of molecular weight up to 20000
conditions.evidence_text: Corresponding to the critical conditions for PEO on the Chrompak RP-18 phase is the composition 58:42 (v/v). In this instance the retention volume versus macromolecule size dependence disappears up to a molecular weight of 20000 (Fig. 2).
conditions.notes: Used to separate PEO by functionality types (terminal groups).
conditions.physical_address: Institute of Chemical Physics, U.S.S.R. Academy of Sciences, Kosygina 4, 117977 Moscow (U.S.S.R.)

conditions.analyte_polymer: PEO-PPO block copolymers (AB and ABA types)
conditions.architecture: Block copolymer (PEO blocks are 'invisible' at critical condition)
conditions.critical_condition_basis: PEO blocks disappear (critical condition for PEO), separation based on PPO block size
conditions.evidence_text: Conditions as in Fig. 3... Disappearance of PEO blocks and the MWD of PPO blocks for two-block PEO-PPO copolymers... At the critical point for PEO the outer blocks disappear, irrespective of their length.
conditions.notes: Same mobile phase composition as the PEO homopolymer critical condition. Used to analyze PPO block molecular weight distribution.
conditions.physical_address: Institute of Chemical Physics, U.S.S.R. Academy of Sciences, Kosygina 4, 117977 Moscow (U.S.S.R.)

conditions.critical_condition_basis: Comparison with block copolymers under critical conditions for PEO
conditions.evidence_text: Chromatograms of a block and a random copolymer of similar composition under the critical conditions for one of the PEO homopolymers. Separation conditions as in Fig. 3.
conditions.notes: Used to distinguish random vs block ordering. Random copolymers elute earlier than block copolymers of same composition under these conditions.
conditions.physical_address: Institute of Chemical Physics, U.S.S.R. Academy of Sciences, Kosygina 4, 117977 Moscow (U.S.S.R.)
